requirement_topic.en: TBS PVoC Import Certificate of Conformity
requirement_topic.zh: TBS PVoC 进口合格证书
requirement_topic.zht: TBS PVoC 進口合格證書

summary.en: Tanzania Bureau of Standards states that PVoC verifies selected imported goods against applicable national standards before shipment, and consignments subject to PVoC must obtain mandatory customs-clearance documents and a Certificate of Conformity before shipment. For a PV inverter shipment, the importer or exporter should check the current TBS regulated HS-code list and the appointed PVoC service provider route before loading.
summary.zh: 坦桑尼亚标准局说明，PVoC 用于在装运前核验特定进口货物是否符合适用国家标准，受 PVoC 管制的货物在装运前必须取得强制清关文件和合格证书。光伏逆变器出货前，进口商或出口商应核对现行 TBS 受管制 HS 编码清单及指定 PVoC 服务商路径。
summary.zht: 坦尚尼亞標準局說明，PVoC 用於在裝運前核驗特定進口貨物是否符合適用國家標準，受 PVoC 管制的貨物在裝運前必須取得強制清關文件和合格證書。光伏逆變器出貨前，進口商或出口商應核對現行 TBS 受管制 HS 編碼清單及指定 PVoC 服務商路徑。

standards_or_laws: Tanzania Standards Act No. 2 of 2009, section 4(1)(s)
TBS Pre-shipment Verification of Conformity (PVoC) procedure
TBS regulated HS codes under the PVoC programme

summary.en: China factory certificates, domestic test reports, CCC-exemption notes, CQC or CGC voluntary certificates, and Chinese customs files can support the PVoC document review but do not replace a Tanzania PVoC Certificate of Conformity when the HS code and product are in scope.
summary.zh: 中国工厂证书、国内检测报告、CCC 免办说明、CQC 或 CGC 自愿证书以及中国海关文件可支持 PVoC 文件审核，但在 HS 编码和产品落入范围时不能替代坦桑尼亚 PVoC 合格证书。
summary.zht: 中國工廠證書、國內檢測報告、CCC 免辦說明、CQC 或 CGC 自願證書以及中國海關文件可支持 PVoC 文件審核，但在 HS 編碼和產品落入範圍時不能替代坦尚尼亞 PVoC 合格證書。

standards_or_laws: CQC / CGC voluntary inverter certificates where available

gap.en: The key gap is procedural: a technically compliant China-origin inverter may still face rejection, fines, destination inspection, re-export, or delay if the Tanzania PVoC file and CoC are not completed before shipment for a regulated consignment.
gap.zh: 关键差距在程序层面：中国产逆变器即使技术上合格，如受管制货物未在装运前完成坦桑尼亚 PVoC 文件和 CoC，仍可能被拒收、罚款、目的港检验、退运或延误。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距在程序層面：中國產逆變器即使技術上合格，如受管制貨物未在裝運前完成坦尚尼亞 PVoC 文件和 CoC，仍可能被拒收、罰款、目的港檢驗、退運或延誤。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for consignments and HS codes listed by TBS under PVoC; confirm current regulated list and exemptions before shipment.
mandatory_status.cn: Not equivalent — China export or voluntary certification documents do not by themselves satisfy Tanzania PVoC.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat PVoC as a shipment gate, not only a technical test file. Confirm HS-code scope and obtain the Tanzania CoC route before loading.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将 PVoC 视为装运门槛，而不只是技术测试文件。装柜前应确认 HS 编码范围并取得坦桑尼亚 CoC 路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將 PVoC 視為裝運門檻，而不只是技術測試文件。裝櫃前應確認 HS 編碼範圍並取得坦尚尼亞 CoC 路徑。

requirement_topic.en: Tanzania Standards Catalogue and Compulsory-vs-Voluntary Status
requirement_topic.zh: 坦桑尼亚标准目录及强制/自愿属性
requirement_topic.zht: 坦尚尼亞標準目錄及強制／自願屬性

summary.en: TBS describes its standards catalogue as containing bibliographic information on Tanzania standards, including voluntary and compulsory standards across electrical engineering, energy, conformity assessment, and related fields. For PV inverters, the applicable TZS or adopted IEC references should be checked against the current catalogue and any compulsory or gazetted standard lists rather than assumed from an IEC or China report alone.
summary.zh: TBS 说明其标准目录载有坦桑尼亚标准的书目信息，包括电气工程、能源、合格评定等领域的自愿和强制标准。光伏逆变器适用的 TZS 或采标 IEC 文件，应按现行目录及任何强制或公告标准清单核对，而不能仅凭 IEC 或中国报告推定。
summary.zht: TBS 說明其標準目錄載有坦尚尼亞標準的書目資訊，包括電氣工程、能源、合格評定等領域的自願和強制標準。光伏逆變器適用的 TZS 或採標 IEC 文件，應按現行目錄及任何強制或公告標準清單核對，而不能僅憑 IEC 或中國報告推定。

standards_or_laws: TBS compulsory standards list where applicable
TBS gazetted standards list where applicable

summary.en: China GB/T and NB/T standards are useful for engineering comparison but are not Tanzania standards. If a TZS or adopted IEC standard is compulsory for the import route, the China report should be crosswalked clause by clause and accepted by the PVoC provider or local reviewer.
summary.zh: 中国 GB/T 和 NB/T 标准可用于工程对照，但不是坦桑尼亚标准。如进口路径中某项 TZS 或采标 IEC 标准属于强制要求，应将中国报告逐条款对照，并取得 PVoC 服务商或当地审核方接受。
summary.zht: 中國 GB/T 和 NB/T 標準可用於工程對照，但不是坦尚尼亞標準。如進口路徑中某項 TZS 或採標 IEC 標準屬於強制要求，應將中國報告逐條款對照，並取得 PVoC 服務商或當地審核方接受。

gap.en: Do not label every IEC or TZS reference as mandatory. The mandatory status depends on TBS compulsory or gazetted lists, PVoC HS-code scope, project specifications, and grid-connection requirements.
gap.zh: 不要将每项 IEC 或 TZS 引用都标为强制。强制属性取决于 TBS 强制或公告清单、PVoC HS 编码范围、项目规格及并网要求。
gap.zht: 不要將每項 IEC 或 TZS 引用都標為強制。強制屬性取決於 TBS 強制或公告清單、PVoC HS 編碼範圍、項目規格及併網要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mixed — Tanzania standards may be voluntary or compulsory; verify the current TBS catalogue, compulsory standards, gazetted standards, and PVoC HS-code list.
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary or project-driven for many China inverter standards; not automatically transferable to Tanzania.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Confirm mandatory status from TBS lists and the PVoC route. A standard reference alone does not prove market-access approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应从 TBS 清单和 PVoC 路径确认强制属性。单独引用标准并不能证明已获市场准入。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應從 TBS 清單和 PVoC 路徑確認強制屬性。單獨引用標準並不能證明已獲市場准入。
